generated_from: expo/docs/pages/eas-update @ 2026-06-07; VISUALLY HARDENED 2026-06-07 (all in-scope themes confirmed by eye, not luminance). Scoped to Expo dashboard screens per the playbook. 4 dashboard screens are in scope: 2 auto-capture (deployments-website-tab [light], channels-linked-branches [dark]) + 2 NEEDS_REACH (branch-update-list [light], asset-list [dark] - both still need a clicks selector added from live DOM since capture.ts has no [branch]/[updateGroupId] token). Routes confirmed from universe (SidebarNavigation/helpers.ts + next.config.ts): channels /channels, branches /branches, updates /updates/[updateGroupId], deployments /deployments (redirects to /channels?source=deployments). RECLASSIFIED during the visual pass: channel-branch-link and channel-branch-link-2 are CONCEPTUAL DIAGRAMS (white cards + connector line, emoji icons), NOT live Channels-page captures, so they are now OUT with the other illustrations. ~10 other pure diagrams (how-it-works layers/builds/branch/default-link/custom-link-1..3/process, optimize-assets process, bundle-diffing, runtime-versions layers, debug debug-map) are EXCLUDED entirely. PROJECT: needs a project with published EAS updates (channels/branches/updates); if the default project has none, pass --project=<slug>, else pages render empty and compare as unsure.

screenshots.depicts: The Deployments page for a project (Deployments tab / Go to the Deployments page)
screenshots.scope_note: Deployments page; /deployments redirects to /channels?source=deployments. Reachable read-only on a project with published updates. THEME CONFIRMED light by eye (white sidebar crop: Project picker 'sticker-smash', Back to Dashboard, Overview/Deployments/Submissions nav with Deployments highlighted).

screenshots.scope_note: Channels page. Reachable read-only on a project that has channels with linked branches. THEME CONFIRMED dark by eye (dark Channels page: 'production' channel card, ID + 'Linked branches' columns).

screenshots.depicts: Conceptual diagram: a 'Channel: production' card connected by a line to a 'Branch: version-1.0' card (eas-cli channel/branch linking)

screenshots.depicts: Branch Detail page showing the list of updates in a branch (Verify the update)
reach: open a branch from the Branches list to view its update list on the Branch Detail page
screenshots.scope_note: Branch Detail update list. The detail URL needs a specific branch name (no [branch] token in capture.ts), so test_url is the Branches list and this surfaces as NEEDS_REACH; add a clicks selector for a branch row from live DOM, or hardcode /branches/<branch>. THEME CONFIRMED light by eye (white Branch detail: 'Branch: production' card, 'Updates list' with Runtime version + Platforms columns annotated).

screenshots.depicts: Asset list for a single update (all assets included in an update) on the update detail page (Viewing all assets included in an update)
reach: open an update group from the Updates list, then view its asset list on the update group detail page
screenshots.scope_note: Asset list on an update group detail page (/updates/[updateGroupId]). The detail URL needs an [updateGroupId] (no token), so test_url is the Updates list and this surfaces as NEEDS_REACH; add a clicks selector for an update row from live DOM. THEME CONFIRMED dark by eye (dark update-group detail: 'Update groups' back nav, Overview/Android/iOS sub-nav, 'Assets' table with Name/Downloads/Compressed size/Raw size).

settings.scope_note: Project Channels page (confirmed route). Lists channels and linked branches.
Project Branches page (confirmed route). Branch detail is /branches/<branch>.
Project Updates (update groups) page (confirmed route). Update detail is /updates/<updateGroupId>, which holds the asset list.
